parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed XML/content issues and obvious encoding faults while preserving structure and meaning: (1) closed a missing </BIBL> after the 'Sapientia Mos...' entry, (2) escaped '&' as '&' in XML text, (3) corrected 'Prideaun' to 'Prideaux', (4) normalized corrupted 'Augustinerga√üc' to 'Augustinergaße', (5) normalized 'V√∂lcker' to 'Völcker', (6) corrected '1I.' to 'II.' in volume notation, (7) normalized '8√≤.' to '8°.' in one FORMAT, (8) normalized two occurrences of '8v√≤.' to '8vo.', (9) normalized 'B√∂dickers' to 'Bödickers', and (10) normalized 'Grunds√§tze' to 'Grundsätze'.
